name: SUPERIOR GROUP OF COMPANIES, INC.
summary: Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (SGC), organized in 1920 and incorporated in 1922, operates three segments: Branded Products (customized merchandising, promotional products, and branded uniform programs via BAMKO and HPI brands), Healthcare Apparel (scrubs, lab coats, patient apparel via Fashion Seal Healthcare, Wink, CID Resources, and Carhartt Medical license), and Contact Centers (outsourced business process and call-center services via The Office Gurus in El Salvador, Belize, Dominican Republic, and the United States).

products.name: Branded Uniform Programs
products.description: Customized branded uniform programs sold to retail, food service, transportation, and other industries via BAMKO and HPI brands.

products.name: Promotional Products
products.description: Customized merchandising solutions, corporate awards, event promotions, and specialty packaging for a wide range of industries.

products.name: Healthcare Apparel
products.description: Scrubs, lab coats, patient gowns, clean room apparel, and personal protective equipment sold to healthcare laundries, distributors, and consumers.

products.name: Contact Center Services
products.description: Outsourced nearshore and onshore business process outsourcing and call-center support services for North American customers via The Office Gurus.

products.name: Branded Uniform Programs
products.description: Customized branded uniform and merchandising solutions sold across retail, food service, entertainment, and transportation industries.

products.name: Promotional Products
products.description: Corporate awards, event promotions, specialty packaging, and employee/consumer rewards and incentives.

products.name: Healthcare Apparel
products.description: Scrubs, lab coats, patient gowns, isolation gowns, and clean room apparel for hospitals and healthcare facilities.

products.name: Contact Center Services
products.description: Outsourced nearshore and onshore business process outsourcing and call-center support for North American customers.

partnerships.description: Superior licenses the Carhartt Medical brand for use in its Healthcare Apparel segment.
Superior licenses the Carhartt Medical brand for its Healthcare Apparel segment.
